sanskrit: सत्त्वं रजस्तम इति गुणाः प्रकृतिसंभवाः । निबध्नन्ति महाबाहो देहे देहिनमव्ययम् ॥
hindiTranslation: हे महाबाहो  प्रकृतिसे उत्पन्न होनेवाले सत्त्व, रज और तम  ये तीनों गुण अविनाशी देहीको देहमें बाँध देते हैं ॥
englishTranslation: Arjuna, the three qualities of nature—sattva, rajas, and tamas—bind the imperishable inner being to the body.
essence: Nature's three forces keep the changeless one identified with the body.
speaker: Krishna
